items.title: ‘Minions’ movies have been runaway hits — but is ‘franchise fatigue’ finally setting in?
items.description: The new “Minions & Monsters” film is the seventh in the series, and is expected to bring in less than previous releases.

items.title: Retiring abroad sounds like a dream — what could go wrong? Actually, a lot.
items.description: We hear about the older Americans who bask in apparent paradise far from home — but that’s not the whole story.

items.title: Why maxing out your 401(k) is a major financial mistake if you have credit-card and other punishing debt
items.description: Grabbing an employer match is essential, but prioritizing high-interest debt and emergency cash can bring much better near-term results.

items.title: ‘We are more likely to be living in poverty’: Social Security is a lifeline for women, so why are we ignored?
items.description: “We are more likely to live longer, to live alone and to be caregivers.”

items.title: Opening a ‘Trump account’ for your children? Here is the risk you need to reckon with first.
items.description: The new accounts ban bonds and international stocks, forcing parents to bet their children’s financial future entirely on U.S. equities.

items.title: Nvidia is betting on a trillion-dollar robotics boom. Here is the hidden way to trade it.
items.description: CEO Jensen Huang has called humanoid robots a “multitrillion-dollar economic opportunity.”

items.title: Want to live longer in retirement? This one money move could add years to your life.
items.description: A secure retirement portfolio acts like a health shield, calming market anxiety that can actually shorten  life expectancy.

items.title: SpaceX panic sends Verizon and AT&T shares toward their worst week in years
items.description: The two telecom companies’ stocks are having a terrible week as the threat of Starlink looms.

items.title: Hybrids are the breakout star of the U.S. car market as EV demand fades
items.description: Hybrids aren’t a bridge to EVs anymore — instead, they’re winning on function and price.

items.title: Trump’s real-estate licensing income in foreign countries nearly doubled — and now features Qatar and Romania
items.description: One ethics watchdog has “grave concerns about the president doing business in foreign countries.”
